title: Tremor

referral.text: Supports rest or asymmetric tremor, stiffness, slowness, balance or gait difficulty, symmetrical postural tremor, medicine, thyroid and alcohol review, functional impact, head tremor, and clinician-led referral.
referral.rationale: Supports mapped adult tremor identity, distribution, rest or action context, functional impact, gait, rigidity, bradykinesia, thyroid review, and clinician referral fields.
referral.evidence_extract: Supports rest or asymmetric tremor, stiffness, slowness, balance or gait difficulty, symmetrical postural tremor, medicine, thyroid and alcohol review, functional impact, head tremor, and clinician-led referral.

source_limitations: People aged 16 years or younger are outside the exact source.

Onset, family history, caffeine, alcohol response, weakness, detailed tremor amplitude or frequency, coordination, handwriting, voice or tongue tremor, copper studies, imaging, medicine plans, beta blockers, lifestyle advice, and fixed follow-up remain unsupported.
Diagnosis, treatment selection, medicine dosing, and qualified clinician review remain clinician responsibilities.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
